The **women's 200 metre backstroke** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 29 with the heats and the semifinals and July 30 with the final.

The final was won by sixteen-year-old American [Missy Franklin](/wiki/Missy_Franklin "Missy Franklin") in a time of 2:05.10. Franklin's time was the third-fastest ever in the event, only behind Zimbabwean [Kirsty Coventry](/wiki/Kirsty_Coventry "Kirsty Coventry") (2:04.81) and Russian [Anastasia Zuyeva](/wiki/Anastasia_Valeryevna_Zuyeva "Anastasia Valeryevna Zuyeva") (2:04.94).
